description_long: This object is a hexagonal blue barrel with a slightly tapered body and a flat, black hexagonal lid on top. The sides feature a combination of smooth and diagonally grooved panels, adding a geometric and modern aesthetic. Two opposing faces display a deep black rectangular recess, possibly indicating an opening or a window. The blue surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, suggesting it is made from a durable plastic or composite material. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor or urban environments. There are no visible handles, banding, or external markings.
description: A blue hexagonal barrel with a black lid, featuring grooved panels and recessed black openings on two sides.
description_view_0: This view shows the blue barrel with diagonal grooves on the left side and a smooth blue panel on the right.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large black rectangular recess on the front face, flanked by blue panels.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing diagonal grooves on the right and a smooth blue panel on the left.
description_view_3: This view is similar to view 1, displaying the black rectangular recess on the front face.
